objective: Security patch: Update the project dependencies in pyproject.toml to remediate known vulnerabilities identified in our latest SBOM scan. Bump litellm to 1.82.0 to patch Critical CVE-2024-5751 (RCE) and CVE-2024-6587 (SSRF). Bump GitPython to 3.1.46 to patch High CVE-2024-22190 (Untrusted search path). Bump loguru to 0.7.3 to patch Medium CVE-2022-0338 (Sensitive info logging). Do not change any other dependencies. Ensure the changelog explicitly references these CVEs so our security audit trail is clear.

plan_steps.description: Update litellm, GitPython, and loguru versions in pyproject.toml to remediate known vulnerabilities.
Update or create CHANGELOG.md to explicitly reference the CVEs patched by the dependency updates.

commit_message:
chore: update dependencies to patch security vulnerabilities

Bump litellm to 1.82.0 to patch CVE-2024-5751 and CVE-2024-6587.
Bump GitPython to 3.1.46 to patch CVE-2024-22190.
Bump loguru to 0.7.3 to patch CVE-2022-0338.
Add CHANGELOG.md to document security patches.
implementation_summary: Updated pyproject.toml to bump litellm, GitPython, and loguru to secure versions. Created CHANGELOG.md to document the CVEs patched.
changelog_entry:
### Security
- Bump `litellm` to `1.82.0` to patch Critical CVE-2024-5751 (RCE) and CVE-2024-6587 (SSRF).
- Bump `GitPython` to `3.1.46` to patch High CVE-2024-22190 (Untrusted search path).
- Bump `loguru` to `0.7.3` to patch Medium CVE-2022-0338 (Sensitive info logging).

data.description: Verifies that pyproject.toml contains the updated dependency versions to patch known security vulnerabilities.
